meta.practiceTagline: It's Your Life... Live it in Health!

reviews.name: Tina M.
reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Jackson for a few different things over the past 7 years. I love the care he gives to my family.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.text: Dr. Jackson takes a whole-person approach that really works. He listens carefully and finds the root cause rather than just treating symptoms. My back pain is gone.

reviews.name: Sarah L.
reviews.text: Been coming to Bayshore for years. Dr. Jackson is thorough, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about your health. Highly recommend to anyone in the Oconto area.

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: After a work injury I was struggling with neck pain for months. Dr. Jackson had me feeling better in just a few visits. His technique and approach are excellent.

reviews.name: Carol H.
reviews.text: Dr. Jackson has been my chiropractor since 2000. The care at Bayshore Chiropractic is consistent, professional, and always focused on my long-term wellness.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: I was skeptical about chiropractic at first but Dr. Jackson explained everything clearly and made me feel at ease. My headaches are dramatically reduced.

heroSub: You've only got one spine. Take great care of it with supportive chiropractic care from Dr. Nathan Jackson — serving the Oconto community since 2000.

services.title: Chiropractic Adjustments
services.desc: Precise spinal adjustments that reduce subluxations, restore proper alignment, and relieve pain in your back, neck, and extremities.

services.title: Physiotherapy
services.desc: State-of-the-art physiotherapy procedures that complement your chiropractic care to accelerate healing and restore function.

services.title: Nutritional Supplementation
services.desc: The newest and best natural vitamins and mineral supplements to support your body's healing process and overall wellness.

services.title: Wellness Coaching
services.desc: A whole-person approach to health — guidance on lifestyle, posture, and daily habits that support long-term spinal health.

comboDesc: Dr. Jackson combines hands-on technique, physiotherapy, and nutritional support to accelerate your journey to good health.
conditionsDesc: From back and neck pain to headaches and sports injuries, Dr. Jackson has the experience to help you achieve lasting relief.
conditionsClick: ↓ Click a condition for more information
conditionsNote: Dr. Jackson believes every patient deserves a thorough evaluation before treatment begins. He takes the time to understand your condition and health goals, ensuring the safest and most effective care plan for you.
approachDesc: We don't just treat the symptom. Dr. Jackson's structured approach ensures you get better — and stay better.

phases.title: Relief Care
phases.desc: We focus on reducing your pain quickly so you can return to normal activities. Dr. Jackson will assess your condition and begin targeted treatment from your first visit.

phases.title: Corrective Care
phases.desc: Once pain is controlled, we address the underlying structural issues causing your problem to prevent future recurrence.

phases.title: Wellness Care
phases.desc: Regular maintenance to keep your spine aligned, your nervous system healthy, and your whole family feeling their best.

phasesNote: At the end of each phase, Dr. Jackson will evaluate your progress and recommend the best options to continue your care and prevent relapse.
firstVisitDesc: We want your first visit to be comfortable and productive. Here's what to expect when you come in to Bayshore Chiropractic.

firstVisitSteps.title: Patient Forms
firstVisitSteps.desc: Complete health history and condition intake forms upon arrival.

firstVisitSteps.title: Consultation
firstVisitSteps.desc: Discuss your health problems, concerns, and treatment goals with Dr. Jackson. The first visit is about understanding your condition and what you want to achieve.

firstVisitSteps.title: Examination
firstVisitSteps.desc: Full chiropractic exam including reflex and flexibility testing, plus neurological, orthopedic, postural, and physical assessments. Nothing is done without your consent.

firstVisitSteps.title: X-Ray Studies
firstVisitSteps.desc: If needed based on your condition, X-rays are taken to develop the most effective treatment plan and check for serious spinal conditions.

firstVisitSteps.title: Report of Findings
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Jackson provides a full report covering: How can he help you? How often will you need to come in? What will the cost be?

firstVisitSteps.title: Treatment
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Jackson will explain the most effective treatment options. You may agree to proceed with the treatment or not — the choice is entirely yours.

firstVisitSteps.title: Wellness Program
firstVisitSteps.desc: If necessary, Dr. Jackson will suggest a home wellness program which may include stretching, strengthening exercises, and nutritional guidance.

pricingDesc: We believe healthcare should be accessible. Contact us for current pricing and to discuss your insurance coverage.
pricingPackageNote: We work with most major insurance providers. Call us to verify your benefits before your first visit.
paymentNote: Payment accepted: cash, check, and most major credit cards. Insurance billing available for qualifying plans.
insuranceP1: Bayshore Chiropractic works with most major insurance providers. We will verify your benefits before your first appointment.
insuranceP2: Don't have insurance? Ask about our affordable cash-pay rates.
ctaH2: Ready to Start Your Wellness Journey?
ctaP: Call us today or schedule an appointment. Dr. Jackson will assess your condition and get you started on the road to better health.
aboutSubtitle: Doctor of Chiropractic · Northwestern College Graduate · 25+ Years Experience
aboutP1: Dr. Nathan Jackson has been a licensed chiropractor since 2000, earning his degree from Northwestern College of Chiropractic. Based in Oconto, WI, he has spent over two decades helping patients achieve lasting wellness through the true principles of chiropractic care.
aboutP2: Dr. Jackson uses a whole-person approach — combining hands-on technique, state-of-the-art physiotherapy, and natural supplementation to accelerate and maintain your journey to good health. He is dedicated to your well-being and the health of your entire family.

faqs.a: Yes. Dr. Jackson performs a thorough evaluation before any treatment. Chiropractic care is one of the safest, most effective treatments for spinal pain and related conditions.

faqs.q: How many visits will I need?
faqs.a: After your initial exam, Dr. Jackson will outline a personalized care plan. Most acute conditions respond well in 6–10 visits, depending on severity.
Yes, we work with most major insurance plans. Call us to verify your coverage before your first appointment.

faqs.q: Do you treat children and families?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Dr. Jackson cares for patients of all ages. Chiropractic care can benefit the whole family, from young children to seniors.

bookingDesc: Call us or stop by — Dr. Jackson is ready to help you achieve your wellness goals.
